product.name: 4Pack USB C to USB C Cable for iPhone 17/Air/16/15 Pro Max, Type C 60W Fast Charging Cord PD 3.0 Compatible for MacBook Pro/Air iPad, for Samsung S26/S25, for Air Pods [3FT+6FT+10FT+10FT]
features: 【Multi-Size USB C Cable for Every Need】:4-pack of USB C to USB C cables includes various lengths to suit all your charging needs. With 3 FT*1 cables, 6 FT*1 cables, and 10 FT*2 cables, you can easily charge your devices at home, in the office, or on the go without any hassle. Perfect for iPhone 17/17 Air/17 Pro/17 Pro Max, iPad Pro, Samsung Galaxy, Google Pixel, and more USB-C devices

【60W High-Speed USBC Charging】:Our type C charger fast charging cables support up to 60W power delivery, ensuring your devices charge quickly and efficiently. Whether you are using it for your iPhone 17 Pro Max, MacBook Air, or any other compatible device, you can expect a rapid and reliable charging experience every time

【Durable and Reliable】: Made with high resilience TPE material, these type C charger fast charging cables feature great anti-bending and anti-stretching performance, supporting over 30000 times of bending without damage. They are designed to withstand daily wear and tear. The reinforced solid construction avoids breakage and keeps long-lasting stable performance, making them ideal for frequent daily use. Say goodbye to frayed cables and enjoy a dependable charging solution for all your USB-C devices.

【Type C Cable Widely Used】:These charger cord type C cables are compatible with a wide range of devices, including iPhone 17/17 Air/17 Pro/17 Pro Max, iPad Pro, iPad Air, for Samsung Galaxy S26/S25/S24/S23/S22, Google Pixel 7 Pro/7/6. In addition, it can also charge small appliances such as watches and small fans with USB C ports. Whether you need a cable for your smartphone, tablet or any other appliance with a USB C port, this versatile pack has you covered

【4-Pack Bundle】:With different lengths available, you can use these USB C cables in various scenarios. Never worry about running out of charging cables again, and share them with family, friends, or colleagues. Perfect for multiple devices, home, office, or as backups.Moreover, The white color adds a clean and modern touch to your setup, making these cables not only functional but also aesthetically pleasing
